01_showcase.role: approved paper-figure showcase; play this set first
01_showcase.selection: best visual sample selected separately for each condition
01_showcase.claim_boundary: best-case demonstration, not strict code-only causal evidence

02_neerja_forward.role: Neerja voice requested for direct robot testing
02_neerja_forward.selection: one generated trio; forward shoulder and palm-aware W1 retargeting
02_neerja_forward.claim_boundary: same waveform and generated trio across the three conditions

03_sonia.selection: British Sonia, seed 0; selected as one complete trio, not per condition
03_sonia.claim_boundary: same waveform and seed across the three conditions

04_ava.selection: US Ava, seed 0; selected as one complete trio, not per condition
04_ava.claim_boundary: same waveform and seed across the three conditions

05_neerja_expressive.role: alternate Neerja delivery from the whole-trio search
05_neerja_expressive.selection: Neerja expressive, seed 0; selected as one complete trio, not per condition
05_neerja_expressive.claim_boundary: same waveform and seed across the three conditions
